reviews.review_description: It's fun raking the sand and moving the rocks, but the music has a lot of noise in it, and the voice is very choppy and intolerably bad.  Waste of five bucks.  Fix it and I'll change my rating as well.
Very relaxing and serene experience. I love the warm  lighting. Teleporting was nice.

reviews.review_title: Just what I was looking for!
reviews.review_description: Absolutely beautifully done! I love how everything about this is so smooth and peaceful, even switching screens. I would only change a couple of things. In the garden, I would like to be able to work in the garden from any vantage point. Using the rake, isn't as easy as I would like it to be. In the rocks, by the pond, I'd like the option to stay as long as possible. Overall, I'm very happy with this!

I had this app a couple of years back on the Samsung vr , now I have purchased the oculus go I thought I would give it another go, wow I forgot how good this app is, it works fantastic on the oculus go and looks fantastic, the app is a remarkable meditation app that works in a way that will really relax you , I give this app 5 out of 5, I really love the way it looks on the oculus go.
I found this very relaxing. Can't complain about the price.
the breathing exercise has fantastic imigery.
No go controller support, other than recognizing the buttons. All menus and interactive parts are done and selected with head movement, very counterproductive if you are trying to relax.
Amazing and breathtaking but voice was choppy and not working. If and when it gets fixed I will change to 5 stars.
